STATUS: 503
HEADER: Retry-After: 30
HEADER: Server: nginx
EXPECT: rate_limit
NOTE: 503 + Retry-After signals overload throttle, not generic outage. Without Retry-After header the same status is BlockTypeNone (let upstream retry on transient outage path).
---
<html><body><h1>Service Unavailable — Server overloaded</h1></body></html>
